problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
